name: Rocket Road
author: Poki
description: Rocket Road is a skill game where you fly a rocket across a track. You have to match the colors of your rocket with the gems on the road to go further. If you mismatch the colors, the game is over. Can you set a high score in Rocket Road?  About the creator:  Rocket Road was created by play.works. This is their first game on Poki!
